short_summary: Iran deal continues, gang leader killed
rationale: US-Iran deal remains the dominant background story; Trump's claim of killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a new domestic security action worth noting.

top_events.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
top_events.summary: A confirmed US strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a new domestic/security action with real policy implications for immigration enforcement and public safety narratives.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline and market gains from the US-Iran deal benefit American consumers at the pump and investors, but this is an ongoing trend already in the baseline.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China continues an established pattern of US-China tensions; no qualitative escalation beyond the known baseline.
